para_trans: Regarding partial change in posting by promotion to Deputy Superintendent Land Records (Group-B Gazetted) cadre.
Government Order No: Promotion-1225 / Q. No.466 / Aastha-6
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Reference: - Government Order, No. Promotion-1124 / Q. No. 436 / Aastha-6, D. 28.11.2025
In the year 2024-25 of the Land Records Division, in these select years, Group-C, Phrase-II (Headmaster)
From this cadre, the Deputy Superintendent of Land Records, Group-B in the cadre, in the provisional form as per service superiority.
Subject to such conditions as may be prescribed to the following officers who are eligible for promotion, the Deputy Superintendent of Land
Records, Group-B (Pay Scale S-15, Rs. 41800-132300) temporarily in this category
has been promoted. To be posted under Government Order dated 28.11.2025
The appointment of the following officers has been partially changed for administrative reasons with effect from the date of posting of Rakaana No. 5
The revised posting is being done as shown in: -
The referenced d. Other terms and conditions in the order dated 28.11.2025 will remain.
table_trans: the posting as per the order
